callGraph.callee:
r.readRDB.XReadGroup(readCtx, &redis.XReadGroupArgs{
			Group:    group,
			Consumer: consumerName,
			Streams:  []string{stream, ">"},
			Count:    32,
			Block:    5 * time.Second,
		}).Result

pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_cron_executions WHERE job_name = $1 AND plan_time = $2
	`, job.Name, planTime).Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		SELECT runner_id FROM sys_cron_executions WHERE job_name = $1 AND plan_time = $2
	`, job.Name, planTime).Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, insertSQL,
		job.Name, scope.Kind, scope.ID, planTime,
		job.MaxAttempts,
		runnerID,
		dbTime, staleSecs,
	).Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, stealSQL,
		runnerID,
		dbTime, staleSecs,
		job.Name, scope.Kind, scope.ID, planTime,
		job.AllowStaleReentry,
	).Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		SELECT plan_time, status, attempt, max_attempts, next_retry_at
		  FROM sys_cron_executions
		 WHERE job_name   = $1
		   AND scope_kind = $2
		   AND scope_id   = $3
		 ORDER BY plan_time DESC
		 LIMIT 1
	`, jobName, scope.Kind, scope.ID).Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
				SELECT status, COALESCE(error_code, '')
				  FROM sys_cron_executions
				 WHERE job_name = $1 AND plan_time = $2
			`, job.Name, oldPlan).Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
				SELECT status, runner_id
				  FROM sys_cron_executions
				 WHERE job_name = $1 AND plan_time = $2
			`, job.Name, currentPlan).Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		SELECT status, COALESCE(error_code, ''), COALESCE(error_msg, '')
		  FROM sys_cron_executions
		 WHERE job_name = $1
		 ORDER BY plan_time DESC
		 LIMIT 1
	`, job.Name).Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		SELECT watermark_at FROM task_usage_hourly_rollup_state WHERE id = 1
	`).Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		SELECT watermark_at FROM task_usage_hourly_rollup_state WHERE id = 1
	`).Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		INSERT INTO workspace (name, slug)
		VALUES ($1, $1)
		RETURNING id
	`, suffix).Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		INSERT INTO agent_runtime (
			workspace_id, daemon_id, name, runtime_mode, provider, status,
			device_info, metadata, last_seen_at
		)
		VALUES ($1, NULL, $2, 'cloud', 'p', 'online', '{}'::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb, now())
		RETURNING id
	`, wsID, "rt-"+suffix).Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		INSERT INTO agent (
			workspace_id, name, description, runtime_mode, runtime_config,
			runtime_id, visibility, max_concurrent_tasks
		)
		VALUES ($1, $2, '', 'cloud', '{}'::jsonb, $3, 'workspace', 1)
		RETURNING id
	`, wsID, "ag-"+suffix, runtimeID).Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		INSERT INTO agent_task_queue (agent_id, runtime_id)
		VALUES ($1, $2)
		RETURNING id
	`, agentID, runtimeID).Scan

pool.QueryRow(context.Background(), `
		SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task_usage_hourly WHERE workspace_id = $1
	`, wsID).Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		SELECT status, runner_id, attempt
		  FROM sys_cron_executions
		 WHERE id = $1
	`, original.ID).Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		SELECT status, rows_affected
		  FROM sys_cron_executions
		 WHERE id = $1
	`, original.ID).Scan
